title: chiloglottis bifolia
intro: Chiloglottis bifolia, also known as the two-lipped bird orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chiloglottis bifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Chiloglottis bifolia can be made by drying the leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
